A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the final execute_python step (function-call-16601119267278290722), the agent used a narrow heuristic to detect 'food' papers by only searching for the literal "food" near an "Author Keywords" header (and in titles) from paper_docs and then summing citations for exact title matches, which missed many relevant papers and yielded an undercount (2255) instead of the correct total (11203).
